title: maxillaria chrysantha
intro: Maxillaria chrysantha, also known as the golden orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a useful remedy for wound healing and skin infections. The health benefits of Maxillaria chrysantha include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Maxillaria chrysantha are typically made from its roots and flowers, which are used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams.
